title: nonatelia hexandra
intro: Nonatelia hexandra, also known as the Indian spurge or Euphorbia neriifolia, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nonatelia hexandra include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a topical paste, and its extracts have been used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
